title: physalis sulphurea
intro: Physalis sulphurea, also known as the yellow ground cherry, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Physalis sulphurea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being consumed raw or cooked in various dishes.
